name: CopyButton

files.content:
export { CopyButton } from './CopyButton';
export type { CopyButtonProps } from './CopyButton';

visual_summary: A copy button component to create a clickable button that can copy text to the user's clipboard. This component can be used wherever a user needs to copy something, such as a QR code, a code snippet, or a URL. It's usually used inside modal or a dialog.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready button component with the following characteristics:

Name: CopyButton
Description: A copy button component to create a clickable button that can copy text to the user's clipboard. This component can be used wherever a user needs to copy something, such as a QR code, a code snippet, or a URL. It's usually used inside modal or a dialog.
Style: default, filled, outline
Interactions: clickable, animated
Tags: copy, button, clipboard

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
Reference implementation (adapt don't copy):
// packages/@mantine/core/src/components/CopyButton/index.ts
export { CopyButton } from './CopyButton';
export type { CopyButtonProps } from './CopyButton';
